content: Cognee SDK async: fully async Python SDK (add, cognify, recall all await). Critical bug: cognify() hangs silently on macOS due to KqueueSelector event loop issue (GitHub #1743, #2119). Root cause: LLM connection test uses instructor structured output; non-sk- API keys or local models with malformed JSON cause instructor to retry 5x with 128s tenacity window = 10+ min silent hang. Monkey-patch workaround: set cognee.modules.pipelines.layers.setup_and_check_environment._first_run_done = True before calling. prune_data() removes raw files only; prune_system(metadata=True) removes graph/vector/relational DB. Neither is dataset-scoped — both operate globally.
